backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the INDO KIDZ backend, implementing user profile management, school info CRUD, fee category management, and role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl modules.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and recent changes across components, pages, and hooks.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, sidebar, chart, and destructive color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the INDO KIDZ React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the Vite/TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for Homepage, Admissions, FeeStructure, Gallery, FeesPayment, ContactUs, and AdminPanel, wrapped in ThemeProvider and QueryClientProvider.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Displays a styled access-denied message with a shield icon and a back-to-home button for non-admin users attempting to reach the admin panel.
frontend/src/components/admin/Admissions: An admin form for editing and saving admissions-related content fields (eligibility, process, documents, steps, FAQ, portal link) fetched from and persisted to the backend.
frontend/src/components/admin/Announceme: An admin UI for creating, editing, and deleting school announcements, with inline editing state and confirmation dialogs for deletion.
frontend/src/components/admin/ContactEdi: An admin form for viewing and updating school contact information (name, phone, email, address, social links) with dirty-state tracking and tooltip help text per field.
frontend/src/components/admin/ContactMes: A read-only admin view that lists contact form submissions sorted by timestamp, displaying sender name, subject, contact details, and message body.
frontend/src/components/admin/ContentEdi: An empty file with no implementation.
frontend/src/components/admin/FeeCategor: An admin component for managing fee categories, supporting add, inline edit, and delete operations with validation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/admin/FeePayment: Read-only admin component that fetches and displays all fee categories with their IDs and amounts, showing loading skeletons, error states, and an empty state when no categories exist.
frontend/src/components/admin/GalleryMan: Admin component for managing a photo gallery, supporting image upload (base64, max 2MB) with caption and delete functionality via confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/admin/HomeConten: Admin editor for the home page hero section, allowing updates to school name, tagline, address, stats, highlights, and testimonials with save functionality.
frontend/src/components/admin/PaymentRec: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/admin/ThemeCusto: Admin component for customizing site theme, offering color preset selection and custom primary/accent color inputs along with font choice, saved via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with school branding, social media icon links, quick navigation links, and a contact info section including address, phone, and email.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky navigation bar with logo, nav links, mobile menu, login/logout via Internet Identity, an admin Customize button, and a principal ID banner with copy-to-clipboard functionality for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that appears for authenticated users who have no profile, prompting them to enter their name and save it via the backend mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with an authenticated or anonymous identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing Internet Computer authentication via AuthClient, exposing identity, login/logout functions, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations including user profiles, admin checks, school info, fee categories, gallery, announcements, themes, and contact messages using TanStack Query's useQuery and useMutation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using OKLCH colors, and declares custom keyframe animations and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard page that renders a tabbed interface for managing home content, admissions, fees, gallery, contact, announcements, theme, and messages, accessible only to authenticated admin users.
frontend/src/pages/Admissions.tsx: Public admissions page that fetches and displays school admission content (eligibility, process, documents, FAQs) from the backend, with skeleton loading states and default fallback content.
frontend/src/pages/ContactUs.tsx: Public contact page that displays school contact information fetched from the backend and provides a form for visitors to submit contact messages with toast notifications for success/failure.
frontend/src/pages/FeesPayment.tsx: Provides a fee payment form page where students can select a fee category and payment mode, submit a request, and see a success confirmation screen after simulated submission.
frontend/src/pages/FeeStructure.tsx: Displays a public fee structure page for INDO KIDZ, fetching fee categories via a query hook and rendering them as color-coded cards with amounts, or a skeleton/empty state while loading.
frontend/src/pages/Gallery.tsx: Renders a photo gallery page that fetches images via a query hook, displays them in a masonry grid, and supports a lightbox overlay for full-size viewing.
frontend/src/pages/Homepage.tsx: The main landing page for INDO KIDZ, composing a hero section with stats, school highlights, announcements, and fee previews using data from multiple query hooks with fallback defaults.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, store, retrieve, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Fredoka One, Nunito), OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and animations, plus typography and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for 'Indo Kidz', including pending feature requests to set a specific principal ID as a hardcoded admin in the backend access control system. Contains architectural notes, versioning, and clarification settings.
